steps.title: Describe the artwork itself
steps.content: The student wants to introduce Untitled (Topographic Landscape) to a new audience. The most relevant notes are the date, that it is an installation, that it is made of wood, and that it fills a whole gallery room.

steps.title: Choose concrete details
steps.content: A gives broad career context without describing the work. B compares it to the Vietnam Veterans Memorial. C mainly describes the memorial and gives only a vague label for the installation. The best choice gives medium, scale, date, and form. The answer is D.
